name: devrecess-sessions
description: Interactive narrative learning sessions for DevRecess. Learn technologies through immersive story adventures with hands-on coding.

plugins.name: devrecess-learning-sessions
plugins.description: Learn Bun, Docker, Kubernetes, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Next.js, Go, Mastra, C/C++, and Stagehand through interactive story-driven adventures. Each session transforms Claude into a narrative learning guide with story-driven chapters, hands-on exercises, and real documentation.
